caption: A man with light brown hair and glasses stands against a plain, light-colored wall. He is wearing a black t-shirt featuring a yellow graphic of a face and the text "Knuth", and a blue lanyard around his neck with white text that includes "Cambridge". He holds a white tablet device with a blue screen facing forward. As the scene progresses, the man speaks, with his mouth opening and closing and his facial expression shifting slightly. He maintains a steady grip on the tablet, holding it with both hands in front of his waist. The lighting remains consistent throughout the sequence, and there are no other people or objects in the frame. The background is a neutral, nondescript indoor setting.
